content: Midterm exams start next week. Just cramming the night before won't get you ready. There'll be a lot of tough questions. You should start studying today.
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by CK (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: TRANSLATION
ita:Gli esami intermedi cominciano la prossima settimana. Il solo studiare in fretta la sera prima non la preparerà. Ci sara
